blended.narrative: Vail is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,299 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.0" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 23".
